description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines an IMAGE_TAG variable as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Add a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in this stage. In the job's before_script install py-pip via apk add --no-cache py-pip and upgrade docker-compose with pip install -U docker-compose. Then execute the script command docker-compose run web python3 manage.py test.
